prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.9 kg; Height 165.2 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 188mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.1kg; 9 months ago 67.9kg; 6 months ago 68.8kg; 3 months ago 65.8kg; current 66.9kg), Height (12 months ago 165.2cm; 9 months ago 165.2cm; 6 months ago 165.2cm; 3 months ago 165.2cm; current 165.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 31U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 309mg/g; 9 months ago 268mg/g; 6 months ago 260mg/g; 3 months ago 220mg/g; current 268mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 174mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
